# Complete Task

Finalize the persistent working memory for the completed task.

1. Confirm what was actually completed and what remains unresolved.
2. Add a concise reverse-chronological entry of one or two sentences to `.scratchpad/completed.md`.
3. Move non-obvious design rationale to `.scratchpad/decisions.md`.
4. Move reusable lessons or failed approaches to `.scratchpad/lessons.md`.
5. Move runtime-specific issues and workarounds to `.scratchpad/quirks.md`.
6. Remove the completed task and temporary details from `.scratchpad/current.md`.
7. Remove matching completed items from `.scratchpad/backlog.md`.
8. Remove duplicates, stale references, logs, and details already represented by Git history.
9. If there is no active work left, set `.scratchpad/current.md` to `No active work.`.
10. Never include commit hashes, secrets, or plaintext credentials.
